name: evermind-scraper
description: Durable article-to-Obsidian pipeline with multi-tier fallback ladder

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc
scripts.package: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc && npx pkg . --targets node18-macos --public --no-bytecode --output bin/evermind && npx pkg . --targets node18-linux-arm64 --public --no-bytecode --output bin/evermind-linux-arm64
scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/tests/fixtures', { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync('tests/fixtures', 'dist/tests/fixtures', { recursive: true });" && node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js
